text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, after T.M. Opera O has a<n>number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. It seems the time has finally<n>come,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We must break the seal on<n>Pandora's box and
unleash its<n>dormant hopes and dreams upon the
world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, bring forth the box!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, this is almost woeful... Have you<n>forgotten
about our prize?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Think back, Trainer! We were strolling<n>through the
shopping district during<n>the New Year's holiday...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves<n>a
grand-prize winner! Come and get<n>the ticket for
your hot spring vacation!<n>Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A hot spring vacation? How delightful.<n>I would
dare depart this instant, if only<n>I could.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Close it with wax using the king's<n>seal and keep
it safe until the<n>appropriate time comes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now do you recall?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and now that the Twinkle Series<n>has ended, a
period of rest is in order.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Centurial Overlord requires<n>centurial
rejuvenation! Let us make<n>for the Centurial Hot
Springs!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There aren't actually any hot springs<n>of that
name, but we manage to find<n>our vacation spot.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: We soak ourselves in the hot spring.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... The water is fine, indeed. Butnow... Ahh! I feel an urge.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The hot water has soaked into my<n>already
gorgeous skin, making it<n>glisten like a freshly-cut
diamond.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tonight, the midnight sun awaits, for<n>my beauty
shall illuminate the world<n>long after sunset.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My enhanced resplendence will<n>become a
fountain bursting with<n>pristine water!
choice_data_list: Do you want to try the kaiseki tasting menu?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do you even need an answer? Let us<n>go!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Peculiar... My ascension to Centurial<n>Overlord has
not fazed you in the<n>slightest.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With Opera O's monologue now<n>finished, we go
back to our room and<n>enjoy the delicious food.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, that was absolutely divine. My<n>preoccupation
may be with the<n>Western arts, but an Eastern flare
is<n>nice every now and again.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Trainer. Now is the<n>perfect opportunity
to ask...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Are your evaluations of me trulyaccurate?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Very well, I shall explain.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am strong! I am fast! I am proud and<n>invincible!
Tens of thousands have<n>made that realization.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have spoken of my strength and
complimented my skills, which is fine.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But I am also beautiful on top of all<n>that! Just as I
have said many times<n>before.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have rarely, if at all, described me<n>with this
word.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It may be my imagination... But your<n>ability to
judge aesthetics may be<n>lacking.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's upset I don't compliment her<n>looks, I
guess.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, I ask you now. If you feel that I<n>am not
beautiful, you are free to say<n>so.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Your opinion has no impact on thetruth. I am beautiful, regardless ofwhat you think.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And yet, even if so, I wish to hear it! I<n>want to be
clear on your feelings.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do you think that I am... beautiful?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: How do I respond? I take a moment<n>and say...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Really? Do you truly, truly believe so?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I-I see...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Wait a moment! No, no, no!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Your expression is all wrong. It should<n>be more...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Dramatic, poetic... or flamboyant, at<n>the very least!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Your flat, straight answer... How am I<n>supposed
build anything from that?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: There is just no... operatic impact.
choice_data_list: All I did was say what I think.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Stop, please. You assault me<n>with your
purity.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I lack experience in these<n>heart-to-heart situations.
You must<n>add a bit of humor... or something...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Daaah! I am done for... This is dire...<n>What is this
place?! What lies<n>beneath these hot springs?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The aura of the Centurial Overlord is...<n>melting
away... I surrender! I wave<n>the white flaaag!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Of all things, this has turned out to be<n>Opera O's
weak point, leaving her<n>totally vulnerable.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Pant... I must... overcome!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Before this vacation is over, I must<n>become
resistant to your guileless<n>diction.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A tactical retreat to the thermae is in<n>order! I shall
return once my vigor has<n>been restored!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do not forget this!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's a siege at the hot springs. Next, I<n>shower her
in a heavier volley of<n>compliments.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Opera O and I have<n>formed an
irreplaceable bond during<n>this time together.
